## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the new feature or scenario. -->

## Problem It Solves
<!-- What problem or limitation would this solve? -->

## Implementation Ideas
<!-- Any suggestions on how to implement this? -->

## Use Case
<!-- Describe a real-world use case for this feature. -->

## Example Usage
<!-- How would users interact with this? -->

## Alternative Approaches
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, documentation links, or references? -->
